mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.role_name AS roleName, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.data_scope AS dataScope FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = rm.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId} AND rm.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id ASC
SELECT rm.role_id FROM sys_role_menu rm WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId} AND rm.deleted = 0
